title: Lily's Rainbow of Feelings
synopsis: A gentle introduction to emotions and colors as baby Lily experiences different feelings throughout her day, with each emotion represented by beautiful, vibrant colors.

pages.text: This is Lily. Lily has big feelings!

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes, standing in the center surrounded by swirling rainbow colors representing different emotions
illustration.alt: Lily surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Lily is happy, everything is bright yellow! Like sunshine and daisies.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes, giggling joyfully with golden yellow sunshine rays and cheerful yellow swirls dancing around her
illustration.alt: Happy Lily with bright yellow sunshine colors

pages.text: When Lily feels sad, the world turns soft blue. Like gentle rain drops.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes, looking downcast with soft blue raindrops and misty blue clouds floating gently around her
illustration.alt: Sad Lily with blue rain and clouds

pages.text: When Lily gets angry, everything becomes red. Hot and swirly red!

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes, with a frustrated expression as fiery red swirls and zigzag patterns spin wildly around her
illustration.alt: Angry Lily with red swirling patterns

pages.text: When Lily feels calm, everything is peaceful green. Like soft grass and leaves.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes, sitting peacefully surrounded by gentle green leaves and calming emerald waves flowing softly
illustration.alt: Calm Lily with peaceful green nature colors

pages.text: All feelings are okay. All colors are beautiful. Lily loves her rainbow of feelings!

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes, spinning happily in the center of a magnificent rainbow with all emotion colors - yellow joy, blue sadness, red anger, and green calm - swirling harmoniously together
illustration.alt: Lily celebrating in a rainbow of all emotion colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color shows when Lily is happy?
questions.explanation: Yellow represents happiness, like bright sunshine!

questions.question: What color appears when Lily feels sad?
questions.explanation: Blue shows sadness, like gentle rain drops.

questions.question: Are all of Lily's feelings okay?
questions.explanation: Yes! All feelings are okay and all colors are beautiful.
